title: Mobile Word Puzzle Game Creation

• Integrated monetisation (ads + IAP) hooked to Firebase or a comparable analytics suite 
• Basic store assets: icons, screenshots, short trailer 
• Post-launch support window for minor fixes and first content update

Acceptance criteria 
• First 50 levels fully playable, no critical bugs 
• Session length averaging 3+ minutes in closed beta 
• Successful purchase flow and ad display in sandbox mode 
• All text strings externalised for quick localisation

If this aligns with your skill set, I’m ready to move quickly—let’s make a word puzzle hit that earns real revenue.

title: Portugal NIF & Rental Contract
skills: REAL ESTATE | Real Estate | Administrative Support | Contract Management | Property Management | Contracts | Legal Writing | Legal | Legal Research
full_description:
I am relocating to Portugal and need a bilingual professional who can handle three concrete tasks for me, in this order of urgency: 

1. Secure a legally compliant long-term rental contract in my name. The property can be anywhere in mainland Portugal as long as it is accepted by SEF/Immigration for residency purposes. I will supply my preferred budget and basic housing criteria once we start; you will source options, negotiate with the landlord or agent, and forward the draft lease for my signature. A signed, utility-ready contract is the first deliverable. 

2. Manage the entire NIF (Número de Identificação Fiscal) application. That means arranging a fiscal representative if required, completing every form on Portal das Finanças, booking any in-person slots, paying the applicable fees, and sending me the official NIF certificate once issued. I would like this wrapped up immediately after the rental contract is secured so the address matches. 

3. Obtain the declaração (proof of accommodation) issued by the local Junta de Freguesia or relevant authority. I only need the final stamped document; all form filling, submission, and follow-up with the office will be on your side. 

Deliverables (in PDF scan plus original where possible): 
• Signed rental contract 
• Official NIF certificate 
• Stamped declaração 

Acceptance criteria: each document must carry the exact personal details I provide and be verifiable through the issuing authority. Familiarity with Portuguese bureaucracy, Portal das Finanças, and on-the-ground follow-ups will be key to finishing this quickly. I’m ready to start right away and will respond promptly to any information you need from me.

title: Comprehensive Adult Health Monitor Build
skills: WEB DEVELOPMENT | Web Development | Data Visualization | React Native | Flutter | Python | iPhone | Mobile App Development | Android
full_description:
I already have a working proof-of-concept that gathers raw sensor readings; now I need it turned into a polished, multi-platform adult health monitoring system. The core physiological metrics are fixed—heart rate, blood pressure, and overall activity levels—so every layer of the stack must capture, store, and display those three streams reliably.

My prototype shows how the signals come off the sensors, but I need you to design the production-ready firmware for a small wearable, build companion mobile apps (iOS and Android), and create a web dashboard that mirrors all data in real time. Clean, intuitive visualisation is essential: line-charts and trend graphs for live viewing, daily summary reports that users can export, and a responsive monitoring dashboard for caregivers.

Preferred toolsets are up to you—React Native, Flutter, Swift/Kotlin, Node, Python, or similar are fine—as long as the end result is stable, secure, and easy for me to hand over to clinicians for pilot testing. Device pairing, encrypted data sync to the cloud, user authentication, and basic alert logic (e.g., out-of-range blood pressure notifications) all have to be included.

Deliverables I will review against:

• Wearable firmware flashing flawlessly on the current prototype board 
• Mobile app (Android + iOS) with live graphs, daily summaries, alert settings 
• Web application dashboard mirroring mobile visualisations in real time 
• Source code, build scripts, and brief deployment documentation 

If you have experience with medical-grade Bluetooth sensors, HIPAA/GDPR data handling, or similar health projects, let me know in your proposal. The prototype files are attached for your reference—looking forward to seeing how you can take them to production.
